3189780.name: Garden Rivals
3189780.description:
🌱 Garden Rivals

Garden Rivals is a team-based competitive multiplayer game where strategy, bluffing, and chaos collide in fast-paced, intense matches.

Play in teams of two and battle around a central objective: the fertilizer. Sabotage, defend, deceive, and cast your spells at the right moment to gain the upper hand and lead your team to victory.

Every match is different. Every decision matters.

⚔️ Tactical, Fast-Paced Gameplay

  • Short and intense matches, perfect for playing with friends

  • Risk management: attack, defend, or fake your intentions

  • Gameplay focused on reading your opponents, not just reflexes

🧙‍♂️ Unique Classes to Master

Choose your playstyle among several classes with distinct mechanics:

  • Blinker – mobility and repositioning

  • Trapper – area control and traps

  • Harbinger – pressure and long-range threats

  • Echomage – strategy and action duplication

Each class brings a new way to play… and to surprise your opponents.

🎮 Online Multiplayer & Team Play

  • Online multiplayer for up to 8 players

  • Team-based gameplay (2v2)

  • Integrated voice chat

  • Dynamic lobbies with team management

Coordination and communication often make the difference.

🎁 Progression & Cosmetics

  • Experience-based progression system

  • Seasonal Battle Pass with 25 unlockable skins

  • Purely cosmetic rewards — no gameplay advantages

  • Customize your look and show off your progression

❄️ Seasonal Content

The winter season brings a wave of new content:

  • Dynamic snowy maps

  • Updated visual and audio atmosphere

  • Exclusive seasonal rewards

🌼 A Game in Constant Evolution

Garden Rivals is actively updated with:

  • New content

  • Balance adjustments

  • Performance optimizations

  • UI and usability improvements

Community feedback plays a key role in shaping the game’s future.

🌿 Enter the arena.
